risks: Regex /[.!?]\s+/ consumes sentence-terminal punctuation, so content-preservation invariant must be defined as word-level (not byte-for-byte) reconstruction. Clarify whether losing periods/exclamation/question marks in chunk joins is acceptable for the synthesis pipeline.

Hard-split for over-long sentences breaks at maxLength character boundaries, which can slice mid-word. Confirm this is acceptable for the synthesis input use case; otherwise specify word-boundary-aware fallback.
summary: Pure utility with sound guard/empty/trivial-path logic; sentence-aware regex approach is pragmatic but delimiter consumption and mid-word hard-split merit explicit clarification before merging.
